_doc_header: WebSocket message types exchanged between the decafclaw server (`src/decafclaw/web/websocket.py`) and the in-browser client. This page is generated from `src/decafclaw/web/message_types.json` — edit the manifest and run `make gen-message-types` to regenerate.

background_event.description: Background-task lifecycle event surfaced into a conversation timeline (e.g. delegated task started/finished).

canvas_update.description: The conversation's canvas state changed; client should re-render the canvas panel.

chunk.description: Streaming text fragment of an in-flight assistant message.

command_ack.description: Acknowledgement that a slash-style user command was received and dispatched.

compaction_done.description: Conversation history compaction completed; client should reload history.

confirm_request.description: Server is asking the user to approve or deny a pending action (tool call, end-of-turn gate, widget input).

confirmation_response.description: Replay of a prior confirmation response, surfaced when reloading conversation history.

conv_history.description: Page of historical messages for a conversation.

conv_selected.description: Confirmation that a select_conv subscribed this socket to the named conversation. May include initial conversation state.

error.description: Generic error surfaced to the client (bad request, unknown conversation, internal error).

message_complete.description: Final form of an assistant message after streaming completed (or when replayed from history).

model_changed.description: The active model for a conversation changed (echoed back to all subscribers of that conversation).

models_available.description: List of model identifiers the user can select in the UI.

notification_created.description: A new notification was added to the user's inbox (push from notification subsystem).

notification_read.description: A notification was marked read (push from notification subsystem).

reflection_result.description: Output of the post-turn reflection step for a conversation.

tool_end.description: Final result of a tool call. Replaces the in-flight tool_status with terminal state.

tool_status.description: Mid-flight progress update from a running tool.

turn_complete.description: An agent turn finished (success, error, or cancellation).

turn_start.description: An agent turn has started; clients should clear any draft and show in-flight UI.

user_message.description: Echo of a user-authored message to all subscribers of the conversation (used for multi-tab sync).

cancel_turn.description: Request cancellation of the conversation's in-flight agent turn.

confirm_response.description: User's decision on a pending confirm_request.

load_history.description: Request a page of historical messages for a conversation.

select_conv.description: Subscribe this socket to a conversation's event stream.

send.description: Send a user message (and/or attachments) to the conversation.

set_effort.description: Deprecated backward-compat alias for set_model used by older web clients.

set_model.description: Change the active model for a conversation.

widget_response.description: Submission of an interactive widget input.
